title: DfSkillManifest
description: Schema for a `skill.json` manifest in `packages/cli/skills/<name>/`. Each manifest declares the skill's metadata, the templated files that compose it, and the install-time variables those templates substitute.

name.description: Slug-form skill name. Must match the directory name and the `name:` field in the rendered SKILL.md frontmatter.

version.description: Skill source-of-truth version (independent of the CLI semver). Bumped when the template body changes meaningfully.

summary.description: One-line description of what the skill does. Surfaced by `df skills list`.

originatingRepo.description: Optional — `<owner>/<repo>` of the repo the skill was originally authored in. Provenance only; does not affect rendering.

template.description: Path of the `.tmpl` file relative to the skill source dir.

target.description: Path of the rendered file relative to the consumer's `.claude/skills/<name>/` install dir.

files.description: Mapping of template-source files to install-target paths. The first entry conventionally renders SKILL.md.

source.description: Human-readable description of where the value is sourced from (e.g. 'darkfactory.yaml: repo.displayName').

default.description: Default literal substituted when the consumer config does not provide a value. May be the empty string.

kind.description: `scalar` (default) substitutes the value as-is. `list` accepts a YAML array from the consumer config and renders one element per line (used for QUALITY_GATE_TARGETS).

variables.description: Variable definitions. Each `{{VAR}}` reference in any template file MUST appear here, and the consumer config may override the default for any of them.
